title: AHZNB`S Tweaks
description: Adjust the maximum NinjaXP cap in AHZNB's Naruto ShinobiCraft raise or lower it as you like.
body:
[( Click on me to join my Mods Testing server where you can get the pre-releases )](https://discord.gg/z7YNp8XfJc)
 

AHZNB's Tweaks is an addon for AHZNB's Naruto ShinobiCraft Mod.
It allows you to create custom NinjaXP ranks with specific XP limits and assign them to players.
Perfect for servers that want flexible progression and better control over player strength.. also allows you to change the Sharingan dodge rate.



Features:

Sharingan dodge rate in the configs which allows you to adjust the dodge rate.. 1=100% 0.6=60% 
currently it does not show the acutal dodge rate when you hover over the Sharingan.. will come in the next update

Custom Max NXP, configureable in the configs

Create ranks with custom BattleXP caps. 

Assign and manage player ranks easily.

players gain a random chakra color (can be rerolled or set by admins)



ALL COMMANDS:

/chakracolor set <hex> Set your own chakra color (example: /chakracolor set 00FF00)/chakracolor set <hex> <player> Set another player's chakra color (example: /chakracolor set FF0000 Steve)/chakracolor reroll Reroll (randomize) your own chakra color/chakracolor reroll <player> Reroll (randomize) another player's chakra color

/rank create <rank> <volume> Create a new rank with a maximum NinjaXp limit (example: /nxp create Genin 50000)

/rank add <player> <rank> Assign a created rank to a player

/rank remove <player> Remove the rank from a player, removing any NinjaXp cap

/rank delete <rank> Delete an existing rank

/rank get <player> to get a players rank

/setmyrank <rank> usage for CustomNPCs to set a player's rank this way.



small preset which can be changed:

Rank	NXP-Limit
Genin	50.000
Chuunin	80.000
Jonin	120.000
Kage	160.000


[Link to My Mods Discord Server](https://discord.gg/z7YNp8XfJc)
